query: Review these drafted API test cases and tell me which acceptance criteria are still uncovered.

I want a review report for these drafted regression tests before we automate them.
Can you inspect this requirement-to-test traceability matrix and find coverage gaps?
Please review these test scenarios for missing negative paths and weak expected results.
Do these UAT test cases actually prove the business rules, or are they too shallow?
Evaluate this batch-processing test suite and tell me whether the suite split still makes sense.
Score this drafted test set for traceability, coverage, and standards compliance.
Write Playwright tests for this login page.
Generate a brand new test plan for our release.
Summarize this bug ticket in plain English.
Convert these CSV files into JSON.
Set up GitHub Actions to run our API automation suite nightly.
Draft new acceptance criteria for a password reset feature.

Rewrite these flaky Selenium tests in Cypress.
Make a dashboard showing regression execution trends.
Turn these user stories into fresh test cases from scratch.
